data.description: Marathon says unexpected flaring has occurred at its refinery in Wilmington, California.
UK new car demand is projected to slip by around 1% in November ahead of the budget’s planned taxation on electric vehicles, SMMT preliminary data shows.

data.title: Chip used in Solana phones susceptible to unstoppable attack, as Ledger gained full control using electromagnetic pulses.
data.description: A recent report reveals that through the use of electromagnetic pulses, a Ledger was successfully compromised, allowing for complete control over a smartphone's chip. The incident highlights the vulnerability of devices to such attacks, sparking concerns over security. The exploit sheds light on potential threats posed by advanced hacking techniques, emphasizing the need for robust security measures. This development serves as a cautionary tale, underscoring the importance of safeguarding sensitive information stored on electronic devices.
EuroStoxx 50 futures rise 0.56%, DAX futures up 0.52%, FTSE futures up 0.33%.

data.title: Bitcoin purchasing strategy weakened as monthly buys decreased sharply in the second half of 2025 due to the crypto market downturn.
data.description: Purchases of Bitcoin by Strategy each month saw a notable decrease in the latter half of 2025, coinciding with a widespread decline in the crypto treasury sector.
Australia’s S&P/ASX 200 ends the session up 0.3% at 8,618.40.

data.description: Fusaka marks what many consider to be Ethereum's initial advance into vital data collection and capacity mechanisms it has been pursuing for ten years.

data.title: Report by Rockefeller Foundation: Nuclear power, incl. SMRs, can provide up to 20% of electricity and lower costs by 31% by 2050.
data.description: Recent data from several countries including Brazil, Ghana, India, Indonesia, Nigeria, Philippines, Rwanda, and South Africa indicate that nuclear power, including advanced Small Modular Reactors (SMRs), has the potential to contribute up to 20% of electricity production. This could result in a significant reduction in system costs by as much as 31% by the year 2050 when compared to pathways focused solely on renewable energy sources. The analysis underscores the potential benefits of integrating nuclear power into the energy mix of these countries.

data.title: Child deaths projected to increase for the first time this century. Gates Foundation calls for targeted action.
data.description: A recent report from Goalkeepers discusses the repercussions of diminishing global health funding, predicting a rise in child mortality rates for the first time in years. According to the report released on Dec. 4, 2025, significant cuts in funding may lead to a concerning increase in the number of children dying before reaching the age of 5. The report also highlights a series of recommended strategies and investments that could effectively curb this trend, providing a roadmap for best practices to counteract this anticipated rise in child mortality.

data.title: Cognizant aims to reach 2 million individuals by 2030 through Synapse, doubling original goal.
data.description: Introduced in 2023, Cognizant's Synapse program has exceeded its initial target of impacting one million people globally by the conclusion of 2026. Based in Teaneck, N.J., on December 4, 2025, Cognizant revealed its plans to broaden the Synapse initiative and establish a renewed objective.

data.title: Greenspring Media awards 217 prizes to 90 firms at the Fifth Annual Midwest Design Awards Gala in 2025.
data.description: In Bloomington, Minnesota on December 4, 2025, Greenspring Media, the publisher of Midwest Design magazine, honored outstanding achievements in home and commercial design at the 5th Annual Midwest Design Awards Gala. A total of 217 awards were presented to 90 various companies during the event.
